steps.title: Find slope and $y$-intercept signs
steps.content: The points trend downward — slope is negative. So we want a model of the form $y = b - 0.1x$ or $y = b - x$, with $b$ being the $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Read the intercept from the graph
steps.content:
At $x = 0$, $y$ is around $90$, not $80$ — that rules out A and B. The slope is gentle ($-0.1$), not $-1$ — A would drop too fast.

$y = 90 - 0.1x$ matches the trend. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
